---
title: "test_valkyrie_audit_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_valkyrie_audit_empire.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.35
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.10
---

## Intent
The `test_valkyrie_audit_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestValkyrieWarden, warden, test_scan_ignores_init, test_scan_filters_confidence. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestValkyrieWarden, warden, test_scan_ignores_init, test_scan_filters_confidence. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie](file://src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie)

### Exports
- `TestValkyrieWarden`
- `warden`
- `test_scan_ignores_init`
- `test_scan_filters_confidence`
